---
title: "🤖 Agentic AI"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---

Agents and evals - building things that act, and measuring whether they act well.

::: {.grid .home-cards}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .home-card}
### [🔁 Agents](notes/agentic/agents/index.qmd)
Tool-using loops that let a model take actions — built from scratch, then broken on purpose to see where they fail.
:::

:::
